feedback.technicalIssues: I think it was game 8 that paused in the middle and would not let me do anything. I was scared to refresh because I thought it would restart the entire study.
feedback.confusingParts: Some of the controls in some of the games were hard to quickly learn.
feedback.funCriteria: The ones with easier concepts and controls were a lot more fun. I loved the game that was like Frogger.
